message:
test(http2): add E2E tests for PUSH_PROMISE/DATA-stream-0/GOAWAY validation (bd-2c9t)

Add 4 integration tests proving the server rejects malformed frames:
- PUSH_PROMISE → connection close (§6.6)
- DATA on stream 0 → connection close (§6.1)
- GOAWAY with < 8 byte payload → connection close (§6.8)
- Valid GOAWAY → graceful close

Also add RST_STREAM payload validation in h2_fc_clamp_send.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
